headline: Michael Burry delivers contrary Lululemon stock verdict
summary: Wall Street has plenty of reasons to run from Lululemon Athletica (LULU). The premium athletic apparel firm trimmed its full-year guidance, warned of lower demand in the second quarter, and highlighted further difficulties in its important Americas sector. But when a once-hot growth stock becomes ...

headline: Jim Cramer Believes “LULU Could Get Interesting If The Business Turns Around a Little Bit”
summary: lululemon athletica inc. (NASDAQ:LULU) was among the stocks Jim Cramer discussed on Mad Money, along with the recent sell-off in the market. Cramer noted that the company’s quarter was “disappointing,” as he said: Last night, lululemon reported yet still one more disappointing quarter, and the stock got crushed today, tumbling more than 8%. headline: Why Is NKE Stock Falling Premarket Today?
summary: According to a report from Investing.com, RBC Capital Markets downgraded Nike to ‘Sector Perform’ from ‘Outperform’ and slashed its price target to $50.

headline: Is Lululemon Stock Poised for a Re-Rating?
summary: We think Lululemon Athletica (LULU) stock is at a critical turning point: it continues to produce meaningful cash flow, but it is now trading at a steep multi-year valuation discount. Companies with healthy cash profiles can typically use their capital to fuel international expansion or support share buybacks. However, before assuming the stock is an immediate bargain, it is vital to analyze the operational slowdown and margin compression revealed in the company's Q1 earnings.
